settings.subheadline: A revitalizing daily ritual from a family who has been curating tea blends since 1935. Black tea milled to powder, blended with collagen peptides, ginger, cinnamon, and cardamom.
settings.bullets: 💪 Collagen peptides in every cup — skin, joints, recovery|🌶️ Warming spice blend: ginger, cinnamon, cardamom|🥥 Keto & paleo friendly — zero sugar, zero fillers|👨‍👩‍👧 Family tea heritage since 1935|☕ Milled powder — brews smoother, no bitter edge|🇺🇸 Made in USA

settings.message: ⚡ Same-day shipping for orders before 12pm ET

settings.tab1_body:
Spice Rush is a revitalizing black tea blend built on four generations of tea-sourcing know-how. We take bold, full-bodied black tea, mill it to a fine powder for a smoother brew, and blend in collagen peptides and three warming spices: ginger, cinnamon, and cardamom.

One scoop, hot water, stir — thirty seconds to a full cup. No steeping, no straining, no timer. Drink it black, or add milk and a touch of sweetener to taste. A cleaner energy than coffee, a warmer ritual than a supplement.
settings.tab2_body: Bold and malty up front, warming ginger mid-palate, sweet cinnamon and floral cardamom on the finish. Rich body from milling. Drinks beautifully black, or with a splash of milk and a pinch of salt for a creamier chai.
settings.tab3_body:
Hot: Add one scoop (≈5g) to 8oz near-boiling water (200–212°F). Stir 15 seconds. That's it.

Iced: Mix one scoop with 2oz hot water and stir to suspend, then pour over ice and top with cold water or milk.

Latte: Stir into 6oz steamed milk (dairy or oat) with a teaspoon of honey.
settings.tab4_body:
How much caffeine is in a scoop?

About 40–50mg per scoop — roughly half a cup of coffee. Sustained energy, no jitters.

What kind of collagen do you use?

Hydrolyzed bovine collagen peptides. Unflavored, and heat-stable — the peptides stay intact in hot water, so the benefits come through in every cup.

Is this keto and paleo friendly?

Yes — zero sugar, zero starch, zero fillers. Just five ingredients: black tea, collagen peptides, ginger, cinnamon, and cardamom.

Why milled instead of loose leaf?

Milling creates a homogenous blend with the spices and collagen so every scoop delivers the same balanced cup. No steeping, no strainer, no bitter over-brew.

How long does a pack last?

Each pack contains roughly 20 servings. At one cup a day, that's about three weeks.

How should I store it?

Keep the pack sealed at room temperature, away from direct sunlight and humidity. Use by the expiration date printed on the package.

settings.heading: What's in the scoop
settings.body_1: Full-bodied Assam-style black tea, milled fine so every particle brews in seconds. No steeping, no strainer.
settings.body_2: Hydrolyzed collagen peptides — supports skin, joints, and post-workout recovery. Unflavored and completely soluble.
settings.body_3: Warming, digestive, alive. Dried and milled from whole root — not a "ginger flavor" compound.
settings.body_4: True cinnamon — sweet, delicate, lower coumarin than cassia. The cinnamon your grandmother used.
settings.body_5: Whole pods ground for the bright, floral lift that turns a chai from flat to alive. Never pre-ground.
settings.body_6: The tea leaves are milled to an ultra-fine powder, then blended evenly with the spices and collagen peptides. Every scoop delivers the same balanced mix — tea, spice, and protein in one consistent cup.

settings.heading: Four generations. One leaf.
settings.body:
In 1935, my great-grandfather started sourcing tea tin by tin, estate by estate.

Spice Rush is what happens when four generations meet a modern life.

settings.heading: Spice Rush vs. the chai you've been buying
One scoop. Near-boiling. Done.
settings.body: Good tea shouldn't need a strainer, a timer, and a degree in horology. Add one scoop, stir fifteen seconds, drink.

settings.heading: The most useful tea you'll drink all day
settings.body: Every scoop delivers collagen peptides for skin, joints, and recovery. Habit-friendly.

settings.heading: What sippers say
settings.quote_1: I swapped my 11am coffee for a Spice Rush and my afternoons got their focus back. Plus collagen. Win-win.
settings.quote_2: Tastes like real chai, not a sugar bomb. My daily cup.
settings.quote_3: 30 seconds to brew, no strainer, no mess.
